programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After finding his wedding ring in the bathroom, Mama begins to suspect that Vint is having an affair with his new trainee; Mama and Iola go to Kiwk Keys to investigate.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Iola reveals she wants a husband and a family, and after finding a new beau, she decides to introduce him to the Harpers; Mama and the family learn that Iola's new beau isn't that great of a guy.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After installing an intercom in preparation for Naomi's new baby, the family begins using it to eavesdrop on each other.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in a TV game show; guest judges Candis Cayne and Denis O'Hare.

programme.desc: The queens perform a comedy roast of RuPaul in front of a live audience; guest judges Tamar Braxton and Fortune Feimster.

programme.desc: The queens compete in a queer culture pageant and design outfits inspired by the Village People; actress Andie MacDowell and supermodel Joan Smalls guest judge.

programme.desc: A new cast of queens competing for $100,000 must show off their performance skills in a talent show; singer Lizzo guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The remaining queens of the brand new cast bring their gifts to a talent show; singer and songwriter Alicia Keys guest judges.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After meeting and falling for the charming actor Leslie Lemoyne, Mama sees him on "Tri-State's Most Wanted" just as he is arriving to pick her up for dinner; she fears that he may be a dangerous felon.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After calling into a radio show for advice about a broken blender and subsequently causing an uproar after they are unable to help her, Mama is offered a radio show as a consumer advocate by the station manager.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama gets an invitation to her 50th high school reunion, which she has no plans on attending; she later reveals the reason why she doesn't want to attend.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint and Naomi return home after meeting a physic, Madam Rita, telling the whole family about her; but Mama has her suspicions, figuring out that Rita could get most of her information from the beauty shop where she works.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: While comedian Shecky Lewis is on stage performing at the Bigger Jigger, Mama heckles him; the comedian challenges her to perform at Open Mike Night on Monday.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Bubba is looking for a band for Homecoming, and succeeds in booking the Bonecrushers; after telliing the family that the band will be staying with them, it turns out the Bonecrushers are an all-female heavy metal band.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint learns that he is going to lose his job because Kwik Keys is going out of business; when it turns out that Mama owns ten shares of Bernice, the company that owns Kwik Keys, she sets out to stop the store from closing.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Lola and Mama (Beverly Archer, Vicki Lawrence Schultz) become enemies when they compete in a rose show.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama slips on a roll of pennies and sues the bank.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: A live goose, meant to be Christmas dinner, becomes a pet.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama turns sleuth to find Iola's mother.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama (Vicki Lawrence Schultz) sets out to recruit men for a church-sponsored dance.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint (Ken Berry) must choose between Mama and Naomi (Vicki Lawrence Schultz, Dorothy Lyman) when he wins a dinner for two.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy asks Jack to cook a meal so she can impress a gourmet.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack defends Chrissy's honor when a man follows her home from a bar.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mr. Roper is suspected of seeing another woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet runs into her high-school sweetheart.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's uncle pays the rent with a bad check.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mrs. Roper takes a job to spite her husband.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The Ropers invite Jack and the girls to their Christmas party.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy thinks Mrs. Roper's gift is for her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet asks Chrissy to help her entertain a business prospect but gets jealous when the young, handsome prospect takes a liking to Chrissy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy agree to take over Janet's babysitting job for a night; to their dismay, they face a crying baby, no TV and a locked liquor cabinet.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy gets a film camera through her boyfriend to make some home movies; the projector is put to deviant use when Larry acquires a porn movie.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens put their design skills to the test in a double ball challenge, stomping the runway in 42 fashion looks.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: In their first acting challenge, the queens must create moments for a Drag Race Super tease extended trailer.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must make parody PSAs for a new charity supporting first-eliminated Drag Race queens; with queens Tempest DuJour, Jaymes Mansfield and Kahmora Hall; pop star Ava Max guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Michelle Visage's online shopping has gotten out of hand; in this design challenge, the queens are tasked with making outfits from all the junk she has ordered; Taraji P. Henson guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens don shoulder pads and flex their acting muscles in a campy '80s soap opera; LGBT activist TS Madison guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens sing and dance in '60s girls groups The Rupremes, The Runettes and The Shangrulas; comedian Alec Mapa guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must lead Drag Con panel discussions about the multi-faceted world of men; dating, fatherhood and toxic masculinity; comedian Nicole Byer judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in Snatch Game; Drag Race royalty Raven and actress Dove Cameron play the game.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama describes parenthood to Naomi's childbirth class.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: There Is Nothing Like the Dames
programme.desc: Mama (Vicki Lawrence Schultz) hopes to become a member of an exclusive women's club.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi and Vint's (Dorothy Lyman, Ken Berry) baby arrives early.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: Vint and the Kids Move In
programme.desc: Evicted Vint shows up with his children.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint and Naomi announce wedding plans.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: While Vint is at his stag party, the women have a get-together that turns disastrous.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi and Vint wind up on Mama's doorstep after they're swindled out of their housing investment.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The Harper family competes on "Family Feud.".

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Eunice share confidences in jail.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama goes to work for a travel agency.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Tempers flare after Sonia finds out Buzz has been given a later curfew on the night of the homecoming dance.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama takes a weekend trip with an old beau.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama runs out to replace Fran's dress after she accidentally burns a hole in it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack agrees to work for Janet in the flower shop, but he doesn't take the job seriously, which causes problems in their relationship.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The roommates plan a dinner for the Ropers, but their evening is ruined when a blind guy who Jack knew in the Navy shows up.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A pregnant woman claims Jack is the father of her unborn child.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack discovers what appears to be marijuana plants in Roper's garden.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's minister father pays an early visit.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The roommates take the Ropers' parakeet overnight.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An old girlfriend shows up at Jack's surprise birthday party.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack breaks a date with his girlfriend to keep one with a new romantic interest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet convinces Mrs. Roper to join her in a nude beach protest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper thinks the candid diary Chrissy is transcribing is her own.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy compete in a test of willpower.
